scripts.db:migrate:deploy:if-configured: node -e "if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) { console.log('Skipping prisma migrate deploy: DATABASE_URL is not set'); process.exit(0); } try { require('child_process').execSync('npx prisma migrate deploy', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (err) { console.warn('⚠ Warning: Prisma migrations failed. Build will continue, but ensure database is synced before runtime. Error:', err.message); }"
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:migrate:deploy:if-configured && npm run build
